section.heading: Establishment of best practices for local, State, and Federal data collection

subsection.heading: In general
subsection.chapeau: The Attorney General, in consultation with Federal, State, and local law enforcement agencies, shall—

paragraph.content: establish best practices for data collection to focus on elder abuse; and
provide technical assistance to State, local, and tribal governments in adopting the best practices established under paragraph (1).

content.p: Not later than 1 year after October 18, 2017, the Attorney General shall publish the best practices established under subsection (a)(1) on the website of the Department of Justice in a publicly accessible manner.
Nothing in this section shall be construed to require or obligate compliance with the best practices established under subsection (a)(1).
